summary: The session involved the user, Shannon Bennett, revising an Air Conditioning System Acceptance Agreement with AirSmart Pty Ltd. and Vuka Air, including changes to the date and jurisdiction. Key decisions included removing a termination clause and specifying the governing law as the State of New South Wales.
facts: Shannon Bennett resides at 10 Border St, Byron Bay NSW 2481. Shannon Bennett entered into an Air Conditioning System Acceptance Agreement on 16 February 2023 with AirSmart Pty Ltd. and Vuka Air. Shannon Bennett has paid in full for the installation of the air conditioning system as set forth in the invoice provided by AirSmart. The governing law for the agreement is the laws of the State of New South Wales.
